channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年6月4日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Gemma 4 12B: A unified, encoder-free multimodal model #2 Bots have now passed human traffic online for the first time #3 I was recently diagnosed with anti-NMDA receptor encephalitis #4 ESP32-S31 #5 DaVinci Resolve 21 #6 Launch HN: Hyper (YC P26) – Company brain to power agentic development #7 Hacking your PC using your speaker without ever touching it #8 Gooey: A GPU-accelerated UI framework for Zig #9 Skyvern (YC S23) Is Hiring Open-Source Loving DevRel Engineers #10 A Post-Quantum Future for Let's Encrypt
